# 2026-04-28 — Tuesday

Clear morning. Ran along the avenida.

Refactored numpy. Feels lighter now, not necessarily faster.

Priya pushed the lora bump. Broke one test. Fixed it without regret — the test was wrong.

Rolled back the ruff change. The perf gain wasn't worth the flakiness.

Walked to Serra da Estrela after lunch. Got a coffee at Dear Breakfast. Thought about nothing.

Reading the Ursula Le Guin essays again. The one on anger still lands.

Reading the Ursula Le Guin essays again. The one on anger still lands.

The privacy argument for on-device compute isn't about threats. It's about what kinds of products get to exist.

When I can't explain the bug in a sentence I haven't understood it yet.
